title: crotalaria exaltata
intro: Crotalaria exaltata, also known as the tall rattlebox or rattle pod, is a flowering plant in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa and the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys, as well as its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria exaltata include its use in treating liver and kidney problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria exaltata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and decoctions.
